intentSynonyms: write a new message in discord
description: Send a message to a Discord channel. Posts the content to the channel on your behalf; this is visible to everyone in the channel. Optionally reply to an existing message.

channel_id.description: The channel ID to send the message to

content.description: The message text to send (max 2000 characters)

reply_to_message_id.description: Message ID to reply to (omit to send a standalone message)
